TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sarad ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 3,309 buwan, 8,721 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 608 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 8,113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 5%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sarad hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sarad hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sarad hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sarad hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sarad hya' ga Fulufuluan. tay 'zil na Sarad hya' ga Sirakesay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕara* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa *ulu*uluan. taj ʔzil na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕirakes~ɕaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sarad ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 3,309 buwan, 8,721 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 608 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 8,113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 5%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sarad hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sarad hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sarad hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sarad hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sarad hya' ga Fulufuluan. tay 'zil na Sarad hya' ga Sirakesay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕara* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βunun *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa *ulu*uluan. taj ʔzil na s~ɕara* ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕirakes~ɕaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
